# Dify Field Guide

> A concept-level field guide to the Dify platform's internals, written by Doc Holiday
> (https://doc.holiday) by exploring the Dify and Graphon sources directly. Each page
> explains why a subsystem exists, its central abstractions, and how it relates to its
> neighbors. Every doc page is also served as plain markdown at <page-url>/index.md.

## Pages

- [Anatomy of a Workflow Run](/docs/anatomy-of-a-workflow-run/): end-to-end trace of one run, HTTP to SSE
- [Inside the Graph Engine](/docs/inside-the-graph-engine/): Graphon's queue-and-worker execution model
- [The Variable System](/docs/the-variable-system/): the VariablePool and how data moves between nodes
- [Parallel Iteration and Loops](/docs/parallel-iteration-and-loops/): child engines, concurrency, error modes
- [Pause, Resume, and Run State](/docs/pause-resume-and-run-state/): what a run persists and how it resumes
- [The Model Runtime](/docs/the-model-runtime/): one facade over every model provider
- [The RAG Pipeline](/docs/the-rag-pipeline/): from uploaded document to retrieved context
- [About This Site](/docs/about-this-site/): scope, audience, provenance

## See also

- Official Dify documentation: https://docs.dify.ai/
- Dify source: https://github.com/langgenius/dify
- Graphon (the extracted workflow engine): https://github.com/langgenius/graphon
